item.name: Factset Create a Linked Pa Template

request.name: Factset Create a Linked Pa Template

description.content:
This endpoint creates a template from an **existing portfolio analysis tile**, allowing the user to replicate and fetch reports settings.

Remarks:

*   Mandatory fields are required to be passed in POST requests and Optional fields are not necessary. 
    If no mandatory fields are passed, then we can use the template as a component and skip the component creation.
    
*   Mandatory, optional and locked fields can be  "accounts", "benchmarks", "groups", "columns", "datasources", "dates", "currencyisocode" and "componentdetail".

*   We cannot override the Locked fields when creating the Component.

*   Mandatory and locked strings are mutually exclusive.

*   Multi-horizon frequencies are not supported through this endpoint.

response.name: Expected response, created a template linked to a PA3 tile.

item.name: Factset Create and Run Pa Calculation

request.name: Factset Create and Run Pa Calculation

description.content:
This endpoint runs the PA calculation specified in the POST body parameters.
It can take one or more calculation units as input.

Remarks:

*	Any settings in POST body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the PA template.

*   Account identifiers must have .ACCT or .ACTM extension or BENCH: prefix. Holdings mode can be optionally set for every account. 
    Possible values for holdings mode are B&H (Buy and Hold), TBR (Transaction based returns), OMS (Order Management System), 
    VLT (Vaulted returns) or EXT (External Returns Data). Default holdings mode value is B&H. 

*   If we are overriding the grouping with a frequency, we will be overriding the grouping saved to the original component and also overriding 
    the default frequency of the Beginning of Period to whatever we pass in the request body.
    
*   If we are overriding gouping frequency without overriding the group id it will not be applied to the default groupings saved to the original component.

*   Componentdetail supports securities, groups, groupsall, and totals levels of granularity. However, if no value is passed, the default value is 'securities'.
    Additionally, while 'groupsall' returns all the group levels in the PA component,
    setting componentdetail to 'groups' only returns the expanded or collapsed group levels within the PA component.

header.description: Long running deadline in seconds when only one unit is passed in the POST body.

item.name: Factset Create or Update Pa Calculation and Run It.

request.name: Factset Create or Update Pa Calculation and Run It.

description.content:
This endpoint updates and run the PA calculation specified in the PUT body parameters. This also allows creating new PA calculations with custom ids.
It can take one or more calculation units as input.

Remarks:

*	Any settings in PUT body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the PA template.

*   Account identifiers must have .ACCT or .ACTM extension or BENCH: prefix. Holdings mode can be optionally set for every account. 
    Possible values for holdings mode are B&H (Buy and Hold), TBR (Transaction based returns), OMS (Order Management System), 
    VLT (Vaulted returns) or EXT (External Returns Data). Default holdings mode value is B&H.

*   If we are overriding the grouping with a frequency, we will be overriding the grouping saved to the original component and also overriding 
    the default frequency of the Beginning of Period to whatever we pass in the request body.
    
*   If we are overriding gouping frequency without overriding the group id it will not be applied to the default groupings saved to the original component.

*   Componentdetail supports securities, groups, groupsall, and totals levels of granularity. However, if no value is passed, the default value is 'securities'.
    Additionally, while 'groupsall' returns all the group levels in the PA component,
    setting componentdetail to 'groups' only returns the expanded or collapsed group levels within the PA component.

request.name: Factset Create Templated Pa Component

description.content:
This endpoint creates new component based off of linked PA template or unlinked PA template.

Remarks:

*   Any settings in the POST body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the PA template.

*   Account identifiers must have .ACCT or .ACTM extension or BENCH: prefix. Holdings mode can be optionally set for every account. 
    Possible values for holdings mode are B&H (Buy and Hold), TBR (Transaction based returns), OMS (Order Management System), 
    VLT (Vaulted returns) or EXT (External Returns Data). Default holdings mode value is B&H.

*   Multi-horizon frequencies are not supported through this endpoint.

*   Componentdetail supports securities, groups, groupsall, and totals levels of granularity. However, if no value is passed, the default value is 'securities'.
    Additionally, while 'groupsall' returns all the group levels in the PA component,
    setting componentdetail to 'groups' only returns the expanded or collapsed group levels within the PA component.

*   If we are overriding the grouping with a frequency, we will be overriding the grouping saved to the original component and also overriding 
    the default frequency of the Beginning of Period to whatever we pass in the request body.
    
*   If we are overriding gouping frequency without overriding the group id it will not be applied to the default groupings saved to the original component.

response.name: Expected response, templated PA component created successfully.

request.name: Factset Create Unlinked Pa Template

description.content:
This endpoint creates a template which is not linked to any specific PA3 tile. 

Remarks:

*   Mandatory fields are required to be passed in POST requests and Optional fields are not necessary. 
    If no mandatory fields are passed, then we can use the template as a component and skip the component creation.
    
*   Mandatory, optional and locked fields can be  "accounts", "benchmarks", "groups", "columns", "datasources", "dates", "currencyisocode" and "componentdetail".

*   We cannot override the Locked fields when creating the Component.

*   Mandatory and locked strings are mutually exclusive.

*   Any settings in the POST body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the PA template.

*   Account identifiers must have .ACCT or .ACTM extension or BENCH: prefix. Holdings mode can be optionally set for every account. 
    Possible values for holdings mode are B&H (Buy and Hold), TBR (Transaction based returns), OMS (Order Management System), 
    VLT (Vaulted returns) or EXT (External Returns Data). Default holdings mode value is B&H.

*   Multi-horizon frequencies are not supported through this endpoint.

*   Componentdetail supports securities, groups, groupsall, and totals levels of granularity. However, if no value is passed, the default value is 'securities'.
    Additionally, while 'groupsall' returns all the group levels in the PA component,
    setting componentdetail to 'groups' only returns the expanded or collapsed group levels within the PA component.

*   If we are overriding the grouping with a frequency, we will be overriding the grouping saved to the original component and also 
    overriding the default frequency of the Beginning of Period to whatever we pass in the request body.
    
*   If we are overriding gouping frequency without overriding the group id it will not be applied to the default groupings saved to the original component.

response.name: Expected response, created a unlinked PA template.

item.name: Factset Create and Run Pa Calculation

request.name: Factset Create and Run Pa Calculation

description.content:
This endpoint runs the PA calculation specified in the POST body parameters.
It can take one or more calculation units as input.

Remarks:

*	Any settings in POST body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the PA template.

*   Account identifiers must have .ACCT or .ACTM extension or BENCH: prefix. Holdings mode can be optionally set for every account. 
    Possible values for holdings mode are B&H (Buy and Hold), TBR (Transaction based returns), OMS (Order Management System), 
    VLT (Vaulted returns) or EXT (External Returns Data). Default holdings mode value is B&H. 

*   If we are overriding the grouping with a frequency, we will be overriding the grouping saved to the original component and also overriding 
    the default frequency of the Beginning of Period to whatever we pass in the request body.
    
*   If we are overriding gouping frequency without overriding the group id it will not be applied to the default groupings saved to the original component.

*   Componentdetail supports securities, groups, groupsall, and totals levels of granularity. However, if no value is passed, the default value is 'securities'.
    Additionally, while 'groupsall' returns all the group levels in the PA component,
    setting componentdetail to 'groups' only returns the expanded or collapsed group levels within the PA component.

header.description: Long running deadline in seconds when only one unit is passed in the POST body.
Standard HTTP header.  Accepts max-stale.

response.name: Expected response, if the calculation has one unit and is completed with an error.

item.name: Factset Create or Update Pa Calculation and Run It.

description.content:
This endpoint updates and run the PA calculation specified in the PUT body parameters. This also allows creating new PA calculations with custom ids.
It can take one or more calculation units as input.

Remarks:

*	Any settings in PUT body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the PA template.

*   Account identifiers must have .ACCT or .ACTM extension or BENCH: prefix. Holdings mode can be optionally set for every account. 
    Possible values for holdings mode are B&H (Buy and Hold), TBR (Transaction based returns), OMS (Order Management System), 
    VLT (Vaulted returns) or EXT (External Returns Data). Default holdings mode value is B&H.

*   If we are overriding the grouping with a frequency, we will be overriding the grouping saved to the original component and also overriding 
    the default frequency of the Beginning of Period to whatever we pass in the request body.
    
*   If we are overriding gouping frequency without overriding the group id it will not be applied to the default groupings saved to the original component.

*   Componentdetail supports securities, groups, groupsall, and totals levels of granularity. However, if no value is passed, the default value is 'securities'.
    Additionally, while 'groupsall' returns all the group levels in the PA component,
    setting componentdetail to 'groups' only returns the expanded or collapsed group levels within the PA component.

item.name: Factset Create a Linked Pa Template

request.name: Factset Create a Linked Pa Template

description.content:
This endpoint creates a template from an **existing portfolio analysis tile**, allowing the user to replicate and fetch reports settings.

Remarks:

*   Mandatory fields are required to be passed in POST requests and Optional fields are not necessary. 
    If no mandatory fields are passed, then we can use the template as a component and skip the component creation.
    
*   Mandatory, optional and locked fields can be  "accounts", "benchmarks", "groups", "columns", "datasources", "dates", "currencyisocode" and "componentdetail".

*   We cannot override the Locked fields when creating the Component.

*   Mandatory and locked strings are mutually exclusive.

*   Multi-horizon frequencies are not supported through this endpoint.

response.name: Expected response, created a template linked to a PA3 tile.

item.name: Factset Create and Run Pa Calculation

request.name: Factset Create and Run Pa Calculation

description.content:
This endpoint runs the PA calculation specified in the POST body parameters.
It can take one or more calculation units as input.

Remarks:

*	Any settings in POST body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the PA template.

*   Account identifiers must have .ACCT or .ACTM extension or BENCH: prefix. Holdings mode can be optionally set for every account. 
    Possible values for holdings mode are B&H (Buy and Hold), TBR (Transaction based returns), OMS (Order Management System), 
    VLT (Vaulted returns) or EXT (External Returns Data). Default holdings mode value is B&H. 

*   If we are overriding the grouping with a frequency, we will be overriding the grouping saved to the original component and also overriding 
    the default frequency of the Beginning of Period to whatever we pass in the request body.
    
*   If we are overriding gouping frequency without overriding the group id it will not be applied to the default groupings saved to the original component.

*   Componentdetail supports securities, groups, groupsall, and totals levels of granularity. However, if no value is passed, the default value is 'securities'.
    Additionally, while 'groupsall' returns all the group levels in the PA component,
    setting componentdetail to 'groups' only returns the expanded or collapsed group levels within the PA component.

item.name: Factset Create or Update Pa Calculation and Run It.

request.name: Factset Create or Update Pa Calculation and Run It.

description.content:
This endpoint updates and run the PA calculation specified in the PUT body parameters. This also allows creating new PA calculations with custom ids.
It can take one or more calculation units as input.

Remarks:

*	Any settings in PUT body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the PA template.

*   Account identifiers must have .ACCT or .ACTM extension or BENCH: prefix. Holdings mode can be optionally set for every account. 
    Possible values for holdings mode are B&H (Buy and Hold), TBR (Transaction based returns), OMS (Order Management System), 
    VLT (Vaulted returns) or EXT (External Returns Data). Default holdings mode value is B&H.

*   If we are overriding the grouping with a frequency, we will be overriding the grouping saved to the original component and also overriding 
    the default frequency of the Beginning of Period to whatever we pass in the request body.
    
*   If we are overriding gouping frequency without overriding the group id it will not be applied to the default groupings saved to the original component.

*   Componentdetail supports securities, groups, groupsall, and totals levels of granularity. However, if no value is passed, the default value is 'securities'.
    Additionally, while 'groupsall' returns all the group levels in the PA component,
    setting componentdetail to 'groups' only returns the expanded or collapsed group levels within the PA component.

request.name: Factset Create Templated Pa Component

description.content:
This endpoint creates new component based off of linked PA template or unlinked PA template.

Remarks:

*   Any settings in the POST body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the PA template.

*   Account identifiers must have .ACCT or .ACTM extension or BENCH: prefix. Holdings mode can be optionally set for every account. 
    Possible values for holdings mode are B&H (Buy and Hold), TBR (Transaction based returns), OMS (Order Management System), 
    VLT (Vaulted returns) or EXT (External Returns Data). Default holdings mode value is B&H.

*   Multi-horizon frequencies are not supported through this endpoint.

*   Componentdetail supports securities, groups, groupsall, and totals levels of granularity. However, if no value is passed, the default value is 'securities'.
    Additionally, while 'groupsall' returns all the group levels in the PA component,
    setting componentdetail to 'groups' only returns the expanded or collapsed group levels within the PA component.

*   If we are overriding the grouping with a frequency, we will be overriding the grouping saved to the original component and also overriding 
    the default frequency of the Beginning of Period to whatever we pass in the request body.
    
*   If we are overriding gouping frequency without overriding the group id it will not be applied to the default groupings saved to the original component.

response.name: Expected response, templated PA component created successfully.

request.name: Factset Create Unlinked Pa Template

description.content:
This endpoint creates a template which is not linked to any specific PA3 tile. 

Remarks:

*   Mandatory fields are required to be passed in POST requests and Optional fields are not necessary. 
    If no mandatory fields are passed, then we can use the template as a component and skip the component creation.
    
*   Mandatory, optional and locked fields can be  "accounts", "benchmarks", "groups", "columns", "datasources", "dates", "currencyisocode" and "componentdetail".

*   We cannot override the Locked fields when creating the Component.

*   Mandatory and locked strings are mutually exclusive.

*   Any settings in the POST body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the PA template.

*   Account identifiers must have .ACCT or .ACTM extension or BENCH: prefix. Holdings mode can be optionally set for every account. 
    Possible values for holdings mode are B&H (Buy and Hold), TBR (Transaction based returns), OMS (Order Management System), 
    VLT (Vaulted returns) or EXT (External Returns Data). Default holdings mode value is B&H.

*   Multi-horizon frequencies are not supported through this endpoint.

*   Componentdetail supports securities, groups, groupsall, and totals levels of granularity. However, if no value is passed, the default value is 'securities'.
    Additionally, while 'groupsall' returns all the group levels in the PA component,
    setting componentdetail to 'groups' only returns the expanded or collapsed group levels within the PA component.

*   If we are overriding the grouping with a frequency, we will be overriding the grouping saved to the original component and also 
    overriding the default frequency of the Beginning of Period to whatever we pass in the request body.
    
*   If we are overriding gouping frequency without overriding the group id it will not be applied to the default groupings saved to the original component.

response.name: Expected response, created a unlinked PA template.

item.name: Factset Create a Linked Pa Template

request.name: Factset Create a Linked Pa Template

description.content:
This endpoint creates a template from an **existing portfolio analysis tile**, allowing the user to replicate and fetch reports settings.

Remarks:

*   Mandatory fields are required to be passed in POST requests and Optional fields are not necessary. 
    If no mandatory fields are passed, then we can use the template as a component and skip the component creation.
    
*   Mandatory, optional and locked fields can be  "accounts", "benchmarks", "groups", "columns", "datasources", "dates", "currencyisocode" and "componentdetail".

*   We cannot override the Locked fields when creating the Component.

*   Mandatory and locked strings are mutually exclusive.

*   Multi-horizon frequencies are not supported through this endpoint.

response.name: Expected response, created a template linked to a PA3 tile.

item.name: Factset Update a Linked Pa Template

description.content:
This endpoint allows the user to change the request body and description from an existing template.

Remarks:

*   Mandatory fields are required to be passed in POST requests and Optional fields are not necessary. 
    If no mandatory fields are passed, then we can use the template as a component and skip the component creation.
    
*   Mandatory, optional and locked fields can be  "accounts", "benchmarks", "groups", "columns", "datasources", "dates", "currencyisocode" and "componentdetail".

*   We cannot override the Locked fields when creating the Component.

*   Mandatory and locked strings are mutually exclusive.

*   Multi-horizon frequencies are not supported through this endpoint.

request.name: Factset Create Templated Pa Component

description.content:
This endpoint creates new component based off of linked PA template or unlinked PA template.

Remarks:

*   Any settings in the POST body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the PA template.

*   Account identifiers must have .ACCT or .ACTM extension or BENCH: prefix. Holdings mode can be optionally set for every account. 
    Possible values for holdings mode are B&H (Buy and Hold), TBR (Transaction based returns), OMS (Order Management System), 
    VLT (Vaulted returns) or EXT (External Returns Data). Default holdings mode value is B&H.

*   Multi-horizon frequencies are not supported through this endpoint.

*   Componentdetail supports securities, groups, groupsall, and totals levels of granularity. However, if no value is passed, the default value is 'securities'.
    Additionally, while 'groupsall' returns all the group levels in the PA component,
    setting componentdetail to 'groups' only returns the expanded or collapsed group levels within the PA component.

*   If we are overriding the grouping with a frequency, we will be overriding the grouping saved to the original component and also overriding 
    the default frequency of the Beginning of Period to whatever we pass in the request body.
    
*   If we are overriding gouping frequency without overriding the group id it will not be applied to the default groupings saved to the original component.

response.name: Expected response, templated PA component created successfully.

Remarks:

*   Any settings in the POST body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the PA template.

*   Account identifiers must have .ACCT or .ACTM extension or BENCH: prefix. Holdings mode can be optionally set for every account. 
    Possible values for holdings mode are B&H (Buy and Hold), TBR (Transaction based returns), OMS (Order Management System), 
    VLT (Vaulted returns) or EXT (External Returns Data). Default holdings mode value is B&H. 

*   Multi-horizon frequencies are not supported through this endpoint.

*   Componentdetail supports securities, groups, groupsall, and totals levels of granularity. However, if no value is passed, the default value is 'securities'.
    Additionally, while 'groupsall' returns all the group levels in the PA component,
    setting componentdetail to 'groups' only returns the expanded or collapsed group levels within the PA component.

*   If we are overriding the grouping with a frequency, we will be overriding the grouping saved to the original component and also overriding 
    the default frequency of the Beginning of Period to whatever we pass in the request body.
    
*   If we are overriding gouping frequency without overriding the group id it will not be applied to the default groupings saved to the original component.

request.name: Factset Create Unlinked Pa Template

description.content:
This endpoint creates a template which is not linked to any specific PA3 tile. 

Remarks:

*   Mandatory fields are required to be passed in POST requests and Optional fields are not necessary. 
    If no mandatory fields are passed, then we can use the template as a component and skip the component creation.
    
*   Mandatory, optional and locked fields can be  "accounts", "benchmarks", "groups", "columns", "datasources", "dates", "currencyisocode" and "componentdetail".

*   We cannot override the Locked fields when creating the Component.

*   Mandatory and locked strings are mutually exclusive.

*   Any settings in the POST body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the PA template.

*   Account identifiers must have .ACCT or .ACTM extension or BENCH: prefix. Holdings mode can be optionally set for every account. 
    Possible values for holdings mode are B&H (Buy and Hold), TBR (Transaction based returns), OMS (Order Management System), 
    VLT (Vaulted returns) or EXT (External Returns Data). Default holdings mode value is B&H.

*   Multi-horizon frequencies are not supported through this endpoint.

*   Componentdetail supports securities, groups, groupsall, and totals levels of granularity. However, if no value is passed, the default value is 'securities'.
    Additionally, while 'groupsall' returns all the group levels in the PA component,
    setting componentdetail to 'groups' only returns the expanded or collapsed group levels within the PA component.

*   If we are overriding the grouping with a frequency, we will be overriding the grouping saved to the original component and also 
    overriding the default frequency of the Beginning of Period to whatever we pass in the request body.
    
*   If we are overriding gouping frequency without overriding the group id it will not be applied to the default groupings saved to the original component.

response.name: Expected response, created a unlinked PA template.

*   Multi-horizon frequencies are not supported through this endpoint.

request.name: Factset Create Unlinked Pa Template

description.content:
This endpoint creates a template which is not linked to any specific PA3 tile. 

Remarks:

*   Mandatory fields are required to be passed in POST requests and Optional fields are not necessary. 
    If no mandatory fields are passed, then we can use the template as a component and skip the component creation.
    
*   Mandatory, optional and locked fields can be  "accounts", "benchmarks", "groups", "columns", "datasources", "dates", "currencyisocode" and "componentdetail".

*   We cannot override the Locked fields when creating the Component.

*   Mandatory and locked strings are mutually exclusive.

*   Any settings in the POST body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the PA template.

*   Account identifiers must have .ACCT or .ACTM extension or BENCH: prefix. Holdings mode can be optionally set for every account. 
    Possible values for holdings mode are B&H (Buy and Hold), TBR (Transaction based returns), OMS (Order Management System), 
    VLT (Vaulted returns) or EXT (External Returns Data). Default holdings mode value is B&H.

*   Multi-horizon frequencies are not supported through this endpoint.

*   Componentdetail supports securities, groups, groupsall, and totals levels of granularity. However, if no value is passed, the default value is 'securities'.
    Additionally, while 'groupsall' returns all the group levels in the PA component,
    setting componentdetail to 'groups' only returns the expanded or collapsed group levels within the PA component.

*   If we are overriding the grouping with a frequency, we will be overriding the grouping saved to the original component and also 
    overriding the default frequency of the Beginning of Period to whatever we pass in the request body.
    
*   If we are overriding gouping frequency without overriding the group id it will not be applied to the default groupings saved to the original component.

response.name: Expected response, created a unlinked PA template.

request.name: Factset Update Unlinked Pa Template

description.content:
This endpoint updates an existing unlinked PA template.

Remarks:
            
*   Mandatory fields are required to be passed in POST requests and Optional fields are not necessary. 
    If no mandatory fields are passed, then we can use the template as a component and skip the component creation.
    
*   Mandatory, optional and locked fields can be  "accounts", "benchmarks", "groups", "columns", "datasources", "dates", "currencyisocode" and "componentdetail".

*   We cannot override the Locked fields when creating the Component.

*   Mandatory and locked strings are mutually exclusive.

*   Any settings in the POST body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the PA template.

*   Account identifiers must have .ACCT or .ACTM extension or BENCH: prefix. Holdings mode can be optionally set for every account. 
    Possible values for holdings mode are B&H (Buy and Hold), TBR (Transaction based returns), OMS (Order Management System), 
    VLT (Vaulted returns) or EXT (External Returns Data). Default holdings mode value is B&H.

*   Multi-horizon frequencies are not supported through this endpoint.

*   Componentdetail supports securities, groups, groupsall, and totals levels of granularity. However, if no value is passed, the default value is 'securities'.
    Additionally, while 'groupsall' returns all the group levels in the PA component,
    setting componentdetail to 'groups' only returns the expanded or collapsed group levels within the PA component.

*   If we are overriding the grouping with a frequency, we will be overriding the grouping saved to the original component and also overriding 
    the default frequency of the Beginning of Period to whatever we pass in the request body.
    
*   If we are overriding gouping frequency without overriding the group id it will not be applied to the default groupings saved to the original component.

Through the PA Engine API, request analytics for multi-asset class
performance, attribution, and risk, including the flexibility of choosing
your portfolio, benchmark, return period, and more.
